steps.title: Build the interval
steps.content:
A margin of error of $0.3$ ounce around the estimate $11.74$ ounces gives
$$11.74-0.3=11.44$$
and
$$11.74+0.3=12.04$$

steps.title: Interpret the estimate
steps.content: The plausible values for the average weight of all bags are between $11.44$ ounces and $12.04$ ounces. The answer is A.
